market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.74%, Nasdaq +1.47%, Dow -0.15%. Technology led sectors (+3.30%) while Healthcare lagged (-1.25%). Grok 4.20 (Reasoning) led the day at +0.07%. 1 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +21.37%. Key headline: McDonald’s Presses Ahead in Fast Food’s Value-Menu Wars - WSJ — headwind for risk assets.
market_brief.key_moves: INTC +13.6% (held by 3/6) | AMD +9.5% (held by 4/6) | QCOM +6.8% (held by 5/6)
market_brief.macro_sentence: Key headline: McDonald’s Presses Ahead in Fast Food’s Value-Menu Wars - WSJ — headwind for risk assets.
